headline: Will Baker Hughes' (BKR) AI-Focused Data Center Power Push and New Geothermal Deal Shift Its Narrative
summary: In March 2026, XGS Energy and Baker Hughes announced a collaboration and initial engineering services order to advance XGS’s planned 150-megawatt geothermal project in New Mexico, alongside new AI-focused data center power solutions, LNG equipment contracts, and long-term turbomachinery services awards. Together, these agreements highlight how Baker Hughes is applying its turbomachinery, geothermal, and digital optimization expertise across both traditional and emerging energy infrastructure...
